channel.title: Computer Vision on MIKE Research Clusters
channel.description: Recent content in Computer Vision on MIKE Research Clusters

item.title: Automated Acne Severity Grading via Label Distribution Learning
item.description: Summary of Contribution In this paper, we introduce a robust training protocol that utilizes cross-dataset normalization to mitigate the high variance in human-expert labeling. Our results demonstrate a 14% improvement in mean squared error compared to traditional CNN-based grading systems.

item.title: MIKE Lab Awarded International Grant for Autonomous Satellite Analysis
item.description: We are pleased to announce a new partnership with the Space Research Foundation. This grant will fund the development of low-latency, on-board AI architectures capable of identifying Near-Earth Objects directly from satellite hardware, reducing the data bottleneck between space and ground stations.
